Not available for managed care claims. CMS has required redaction of some payment fields for 
managed care claims due to the proprietary and confidential nature of this information. The managed 
care records are identified as those where the claim type code (CLM_TYPE_CD) = 3, C, or W. 

Dollar amounts in this field represent payments made either by the state or their fiscal agent to
